name: io.github.bhuvnsh/mcp-mapmyindia
description: MCP server for India maps - place search, nearby discovery, & directions powered by the Mappls API.

environmentVariables.name: MAPPLS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Mappls API key — get one free at https://apis.mappls.com

environmentVariables.name: MAPPLS_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Mappls OAuth client ID (alternative to API key)

environmentVariables.name: MAPPLS_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Mappls OAuth client secret (used with CLIENT_ID)
